other_observers: Aaron Schippe , Jeannie Mitchell , Jackie Heyda , Brandon Percival , Bill Maynard .; Bill Maynard was the first observer.
specific_location: Chico Basin Ranch , Cottonwood grove south of Ranch HQ .
description: Shape and size of bird indicated one of the Coccyzus cuckoos. Dark gray to black bill , white underparts and dark brown upperparts and wings . Long tail was in a position that could not see any of the lower or upper surfaces. Reviewing my photos later , shows a greenish ( not yellow or red ) orbital ring and slight rufous tinge to some of the secondary coverts but nothing as extensive that you would expect in YBCU.Behaviors: Perched lengthwise on cottonwood branch. Then flew off into marsh .Call: None heardPlumage: juvenile
photographer: Photographer: John Drummond, John Drummond, John Drummond
